remission.spontaneous_remission_rate: Spontaneous regression documented but rare (<0.5%); 5-year survival stage I: ~99%; stage IV: ~28% overall, improving with modern therapy
remission.best_intervention_remission_rate: HER2+ metastatic: pertuzumab + trastuzumab + docetaxel (CLEOPATRA: 57.1-month median OS vs 40.8 months); HR+/HER2- with CDK4/6 inhibitors: 63-month PFS in first-line (MONALEESA-2); TNBC with pembrolizumab + chemotherapy: 23-month OS vs 16.1 months; pCR with neoadjuvant: 80-90% in HER2+ with dual HER2 blockade
remission.gap_size: Varies greatly by subtype; HER2+ and HR+ have dramatically improved outcomes; TNBC lags; metastatic remains incurable in most patients
remission.barrier_detail: Racial disparities in breast cancer mortality persist (Black women 40% higher mortality despite similar incidence); access to genetic testing (BRCA1/2) and CDK4/6 inhibitors varies significantly; germline testing vastly underutilised
remission.last_soc_change: 2023 — antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs) transforming TNBC (sacituzumab govitecan 2020, trastuzumab deruxtecan for HER2-low 2022); olaparib adjuvant in BRCA-mutated HER2- (OlympiA 2021); CDK4/6 inhibitors first-line HR+/HER2- since 2015; trastuzumab HER2+ since 1998
remission.outdated_treatments: Dose-dense chemotherapy in all settings (benefit only in specific subtypes); empiric chemotherapy without biomarker-guided selection in HR+/HER2- disease (CDK4/6 inhibitors now preferred); total mastectomy without breast conservation discussion for eligible patients (survival equivalent); routine bone scan/CT staging for early-stage (low yield, guideline-discordant)
remission.adjunctive_emerging: Exercise (25-40% reduction in breast cancer mortality post-diagnosis); vitamin D optimisation; dietary fat reduction (WINS trial: 24% reduction in relapse in ER-negative); natriuretic peptide monitoring for cardioprotection during anthracycline therapy; yoga/mind-body practices for QoL and immune function
remission.frontier_signal: Trastuzumab deruxtecan (T-DXd) for HER2-low (a new subtype essentially created by this drug); sacituzumab govitecan in earlier lines; BRCA-targeted PARP inhibitors expanding to earlier stages; personalised mRNA vaccines (mRNA-4157 in TNBC — Phase 2 data 2023); antibody-drug conjugate combinations
remission.notes: Manually curated from landmark trials, registries, and guidelines (disease_db_100.json). Protected from automated overwrite.
